# Huwaal Tech - Web Agency Portfolio

## Project Overview
A modern, sleek portfolio website for Huwaal Tech web agency featuring stunning UI/UX design with animations, gradients, and responsive layout.

## Tech Stack
- HTML5
- CSS3 (with modern features like CSS Grid, Flexbox, CSS Variables)
- Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+)

## Project Structure
- `index.html` - Main HTML file
- `css/` - Stylesheets directory
- `js/` - JavaScript files
- `assets/` - Images and media assets

## Features
- Hero section with animated elements
- Services showcase
- Portfolio/Projects gallery
- About us section
- Team section
- Testimonials carousel
- Contact form
- Smooth scrolling and animations

## Development Guidelines
- Use semantic HTML elements
- Follow BEM naming convention for CSS
- Keep JavaScript modular and clean
- Ensure responsive design for all screen sizes
- Optimize for performance
